testcase.classname: post-activity-evaluations.service getCompletedActivitiesForEvaluation() should fetch list of activities
testcase.name: post-activity-evaluations.service getCompletedActivitiesForEvaluation() should fetch list of activities

testcase.classname: post-activity-evaluations.service getFinalizedActivitiesForEvaluation() should fetch finalized activities
testcase.name: post-activity-evaluations.service getFinalizedActivitiesForEvaluation() should fetch finalized activities

testcase.classname: post-activity-evaluations.service getParticipantsForEvaluation() should fetch participants with eval status
testcase.name: post-activity-evaluations.service getParticipantsForEvaluation() should fetch participants with eval status

testcase.classname: post-activity-evaluations.service submitEvaluation() should POST single evaluation with all fields
testcase.name: post-activity-evaluations.service submitEvaluation() should POST single evaluation with all fields

testcase.classname: post-activity-evaluations.service submitEvaluation() should work with minimal payload
testcase.name: post-activity-evaluations.service submitEvaluation() should work with minimal payload

testcase.classname: post-activity-evaluations.service submitBulkEvaluations() should POST multiple evaluations
testcase.name: post-activity-evaluations.service submitBulkEvaluations() should POST multiple evaluations

testcase.classname: post-activity-evaluations.service finalizeActivityEvaluations() should POST finalize endpoint
testcase.name: post-activity-evaluations.service finalizeActivityEvaluations() should POST finalize endpoint

testcase.classname: post-activity-evaluations.service getEvaluationsByEmployee() should fetch all evaluations for employee
testcase.name: post-activity-evaluations.service getEvaluationsByEmployee() should fetch all evaluations for employee

testcase.classname: post-activity-evaluations.service should handle API errors and throw with error message
testcase.name: post-activity-evaluations.service should handle API errors and throw with error message

testcase.classname: post-activity-evaluations.service should return empty object when json parsing fails
testcase.name: post-activity-evaluations.service should return empty object when json parsing fails

testcase.classname: post-activity-evaluations.service submitEvaluation() should handle update action
testcase.name: post-activity-evaluations.service submitEvaluation() should handle update action

testcase.classname: post-activity-evaluations.service should include auth token in all requests
